comment.body:
### Issue URL (Anti Adblock Script) [https://www.reuters.com/](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fwww.reuters.com%2F) ### Comment > Reuters.com with AdGuard enabled can be no longer be accessed. Disable AdGuard for 30 seconds reload the page and you're in. I noticed this problem yesterday. Before opening Reuters.com with AdGuard enabled wasn't a problem. ### Screenshots

labels.name: T: Incorrect Blocking
labels.description: Website or app not working properly due to filtering

labels.name: A: In progress

issue.body:
### Issue URL (Incorrect Blocking) [https://healthy.kaiserpermanente.org/georgia/front-door](https://adguardteam.github.io/AnonymousRedirect/redirect.html?url=https%3A%2F%2Fhealthy.kaiserpermanente.org%2Fgeorgia%2Ffront-door) ### Comment > # AdGuard is not honoring wildcard or domain-only based whitelist rules. > > ``` > @@||kp.org^$document,important > @@||*.kp.org^$document,important > @@||kaiserpermanente.org^$document,important > @@||*. kaiserpermanente.org ^$document,important > ``` > > The above should disable AdGuard on all Kaiser Permanente subdomains, but it is not doing so. (see attached photos) ``` Username: @ShrtSwrd75 ``` ### Screenshots
Screenshot 1 ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/cv34nsj4v60404www4s4s04ccw4kk488icc6ttewcg.png?nc=1)
Screenshot 1 with AdGuard disabled ![Screenshot 1](https://cdn.adguardcdn.com/sitereports/7efb53l96z480w4kok040kwgwwck8c0mamis4qcvz4.png?nc=1)
### System configuration | Information | Value | |-------------|-------| AdGuard product: | AdGuard Mini for Mac v2.1.3.993 System version: | `MacOS 26.3.1 (a) (Build 25D771280a)` Browser: | Safari License type: | paid Filters: | **Ad Blocking:**
AdGuard Base filter

**Privacy:**
AdGuard Tracking Protection filter

**Social Widgets:**
AdGuard Social Media filter

AdGuard Cookie Notices filter,
AdGuard Popups filter,
AdGuard Mobile App Banners filter,
AdGuard Other Annoyances filter,
AdGuard Widgets filter,
Adblock Warning Removal List

**Security:**
Online Malicious URL Blocklist,
Phishing URL Blocklist Custom filters: | `ShrtSwrd75 Unified Safari Blocklist (url: https://gist.githubusercontent.com/SmoochySix4/d81e58b970c7dc82655f473c6a4759e1/raw/shrtswrd75-universal.txt)` Filters last update: | 2026-03-24T21:19:57 Userscripts: | `AdGuard Extra` Userstyles: | disabled Advanced rules: | enabled Other extensions used: | `Eno by Capital One, Shopping by Capital One, 2FAS Auth`

comment.body:
Hi, you can disable AG at all `kaiserpermanente.org` (sub)domains by putting

```
kaiserpermanente.org
*.kaiserpermanente.org
```

in the "Allowlist" section of AG's settings page: https://adguard.com/kb/adguard-browser-extension/features/other-features/
